## Validation

- [ ] `python -m compileall -q .`
- [ ] `python -m ruff check .`
- [ ] `python -m pytest`

## Data and Secret Safety

- [ ] No API keys, private captures, generated customer assets, or model checkpoints are included.
- [ ] New sample data is public, small, and licensed for redistribution.
